title: codonopsis pilosula subsp. tangshen
intro: Codonopsis pilosula subsp. tangshen, also known as Tang Shen or Dong Chong Xia Cao, is a type of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to tonify the Qi, nourish the spleen, and invigorate the body. The health benefits of Codonopsis pilosula subsp. tangshen include improved immune function, enhanced physical performance, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Codonopsis pilosula subsp. tangshen can be found in the form of dried roots, capsules, or teas, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
